content.speakerText: So, what do you think of my new jacket?
content.speakerTextCn: 你觉得我这件新夹克怎么样？
expectedAnswers: That color is insane on you!
You look amazing in that—seriously, where did you get it?
Wow, that jacket totally upgrades your whole look!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了赞美
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用正确
表达自然度：是否符合朋友间轻松自然的语气
关键词覆盖：是否使用了至少一个场景关键词如 insane, amazing, upgrade

content.speakerText: I got it on sale—50% off!
expectedAnswers: Smart choice! You’re a bargain hunter pro.
That’s awesome—you saved so much and still look awesome!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否同时认可折扣和穿搭效果
语言准确性：使用了恰当的动词短语（如 scored a steal）
表达自然度：语气积极、有生活感，不机械
关键词覆盖：是否使用了至少一个场景关键词如 steal, smart, bargain

content.speakerText: I wore this outfit for the first time today—how do I look?
content.speakerTextCn: 我今天第一次穿这套衣服，我看起来怎么样？
expectedAnswers: You look so put together—like you just stepped out of a magazine!
The fit is perfect and the colors go so well together!
You’re killing it! That’s a head-to-toe win.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否完整回应了对整体穿搭的询问
语言准确性：语法结构正确，用词恰当
表达自然度：使用了自然的口语表达和比喻
关键词覆盖：是否使用了至少两个场景关键词如 fit, colors, put together, killing it
